name: Array Technologies, Inc.
summary: Array Technologies, Inc. is a leading global provider of solar tracking technology and fixed-tilt systems for utility-scale and distributed generation customers. Its principal products include single-axis tracker systems (DuraTrack HZ v3, Array STI H250, OmniTrack, SkyLink), SmarTrack software for energy optimization and weather protection, foundation solutions, and racking systems. Through its January 2022 acquisition of STI and August 2025 acquisition of APA, Array expanded its product portfolio to serve the full lifecycle of solar PV projects worldwide.

products.name: DuraTrack HZ v3
products.description: Flagship single-axis solar tracker using one motor to drive multiple rows via articulated driveline joints, reducing installation and maintenance costs.

products.name: Array STI H250
products.description: Dual-row tracker system with one motor driving up to 120 PV modules, suited for irregular boundaries and fragmented project areas.

products.name: Array OmniTrack
products.description: Single-axis tracker accommodating uneven terrain with enhanced north/south slope flexibility and minimized grading requirements.

products.name: Array SkyLink
products.description: PV-powered, grid-independent tracker control system with wireless technology eliminating trenching and reducing project costs.

products.name: Array SmarTrack
products.description: Suite of software and control products optimizing energy production and mitigating extreme weather risks for utility-scale solar sites.

products.name: Array SmarTrack Diffuse Weather Response
products.description: Uses real-time GHI sensor data to optimize energy capture during cloudy or overcast conditions.

products.name: Array SmarTrack Terrain Adaptive Backtracking
products.description: Adjusts tracker angles to reduce row-to-row shading on sloping terrain during low sun height periods.

products.name: Array SmarTrack Automated Hail Alert Response
products.description: Uses third-party weather data and patented algorithms to position trackers optimally during hailstorms.

products.name: Array SmarTrack Automated Snow Response
products.description: Uses ultrasonic snow sensors to rotate trackers to maximum stow position to shed snow accumulation.

products.name: Array APA Foundation Solutions
products.description: Range of solar foundation systems including ground screws, helicals, c-piles, and ballast for diverse soil conditions.

products.name: APA Titan
products.description: Adaptable four-rail solar rack designed for high snow loads and large format modules in utility-scale projects.

products.name: APA A-Frame TM Interface
products.description: Dual-post tracker foundation with patented A-frame design for challenging terrain and frost-prone soils, offering up to 30 degrees of field adjustability.

products.name: APA Titan Duo TM
products.description: Four-rail, two-high module racking system with dual ground screws standard, reducing foundation posts and material requirements.

products.name: Field Services and Customer Training
products.description: Bespoke service and training packages for utility-scale solar installation, O&M optimization, and productivity improvement.
